case_title: CHRISTIAN HAASE RESPONDENT VS. WILLIAM MONROW LEVIN APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT LEVIN, WILLIAM MONROW AS TO RESPONDENT HAASE, CHRISTIAN HEARING SET FOR NOV-01-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 822061
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: HASS JR, ROBERT C. SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR HAASE, CHRISTIAN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT HAASE, CHRISTIAN RECOVER FROM APPELLANT LEVIN, WILLIAM MONROW $7,085.25 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,085.25, RESPONDENT TESTIFIED THAT THE TRUCK IN FRONT OF HIM BLOCKED HIS VIEW AND HE DID NOT SEE APPELLANT'S CAR IN THE INTERSECTION. THE COURT FINDS RESPONDENT TO HAVE BEEN 25% CONTRIBUTORILY NEGLIGENT ($9,447.00 TOTAL DAMAGES LESS 25% CONTRIBUTORY NEGLIGENCE FOR A TOTAL OF $7,085.25). THE AWARD IS A NET AWARD. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-01-2007 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT MYLES, CLERK CARLA AMADOR, NOT REPORTED. (DEPARTMENT 525)
PLAINTIFF AND RESPONDENT HAASE'S TRIAL MEMORANDUM FILED BY RESPONDENT HAASE, CHRISTIAN
MINUTES FOR NOV-01-2007 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. SEE SMALL CLAIMS #822061.
